mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_tool_info_config ( id, permission_code, read_only, concurrency, state_injected, tool_key, tool_name, tool_name_explain, tool_type, bean_name, class_name, method_name, description, input_schema, output_schema, signature_hash, risk_level, timeout_ms, max_retries, default_group_code, enabled, updated_at, created_at, tenant_id ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.permissionCode}, #{item.readOnly}, #{item.concurrency}, #{item.stateInjected}, #{item.toolKey}, #{item.toolName}, #{item.toolNameExplain}, #{item.toolType}, #{item.beanName}, #{item.className}, #{item.methodName}, #{item.description}, #{item.inputSchema}, #{item.outputSchema}, #{item.signatureHash}, #{item.riskLevel}, #{item.timeoutMs}, #{item.maxRetries}, #{item.defaultGroupCode}, 1, NOW(), NOW(), #{item.tenantId} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE permission_code = VALUES(permission_code), read_only = IF(NOT (signature_hash <=> VALUES(signature_hash)), VALUES(read_only), read_only), concurrency = IF(NOT (signature_hash <=> VALUES(signature_hash)), VALUES(concurrency), concurrency), state_injected = IF(NOT (signature_hash <=> VALUES(signature_hash)), VALUES(state_injected), state_injected), tool_name = IF(NOT (signature_hash <=> VALUES(signature_hash)), VALUES(tool_name), tool_name), tool_name_explain = IF(NOT (signature_hash <=> VALUES(signature_hash)), VALUES(tool_name_explain), tool_name_explain), tool_type = VALUES(tool_type), bean_name = VALUES(bean_name), class_name = VALUES(class_name), method_name = VALUES(method_name), description = IF(NOT (signature_hash <=> VALUES(signature_hash)), VALUES(description), description), input_schema = VALUES(input_schema), output_schema = VALUES(output_schema), risk_level = VALUES(risk_level), timeout_ms = VALUES(timeout_ms), max_retries = VALUES(max_retries), default_group_code = VALUES(default_group_code), updated_at = IF(NOT (signature_hash <=> VALUES(signature_hash)), NOW(), updated_at), signature_hash = VALUES(signature_hash)
